h2: Why is Harmonic Analysis and Study So Important for Philippine Businesses?
paragraphs: In the present world, power is an essential part of daily life. Most daily-use things are powered in some form. To provide people with electricity in a safe and reasonable manner, we must use the most advanced power technologies available. Harmonics increase the RMS of the circuit’s current flow, hence increasing the loss. This has…

Harmonics is an integral part of a power system since it affects the quality of the electricity and how things function. High harmonic levels can cause equipment components to overheat and shorten their lifespan. Pure sine waves created by a perfect power source are modified by harmonics.
